chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-3717 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.12.2025 Mr. Aayatullah Khuwaja, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. = Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, present petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
